commands.summary: [RPP-001] Installed RepoPact 1.9.0 from PyPI; provides the repopact CLI consumed by .local/validate_system.py.
[RPP-001] Removed all vendored RepoPact modules; ForgeLink's own scripts (install/, smoke/, REPOPACT_VERSION, LOCAL_EXTENSIONS.md) remain.

[RPP-002] Negative test: with preflight enabled via owners.json, a marker-less id>=010 item fails with 'work item requires a preflight marker' — proving the config-driven guard enforces parity with the former vendored patch. Probe removed after.

[RPP-002][RPP-003] Full audit passes: pip repopact 1.9.0 validation (preflight enforced for 010+ via config) + LIE-003 schema ladder + link/last_verified. One stale doc link to the removed scripts/repo_model.py was fixed.
[RPP-003] Electron renderer + backend + node --check suite passes; the migration touches only governance tooling, not application code.

environment.process_note: Migrated RepoPact from vendored to a pinned PyPI dependency (repopact==1.9.0). Preflight is now an upstream opt-in (RepoPact decision 0018) enabled via governance/owners.json instead of a vendored validator patch. schemas/ stay in-repo. Vendored tree backed up out-of-repo before removal.
